race.comment: The maiden stayers kick us off. OAKFIELD GALAXY (5) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in four of his past five starts and strikes a very winnable contest here. Has placed around this circuit and maps ideally for this from gate three. Rates the testing material. RIGHTEOUS LEGEND (6) has been thereabouts in both runs since joining the new stable and will be rock-hard fit for this. Looks ready for the step-up in trip now and looms as the main danger. AMELIORATION (7) has placed one from one over this track and trip and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Top-three candidate. EVADE THE GAME (8) has gotten better with each run this time in work and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. In the mix. The well-related HOT MISS (9) (half to Listed winner Royalzel) best of the rest.
